body:
## Summary
Fix 6 of 28 oxlint errors — the 3 `any` types with runtime risk + XState legacy imports.

## Changes
- `pveHandlers.ts`: `payload.target as any` → `payload.target! as Element`
- `pveHandlers.ts`: `payload.targetRank as any` → `payload.targetRank as Rank`
- `pveHandlers.ts`: `buffs?: any[]` → `buffs?: Buff[]`
- `pveHandlers.ts`: add `buffKey()` helper for type-safe Buff dedup
- `pveHandlers.ts`: remove unused `shuffleCancel` import
- `logic/pve/runtime.js`: remove unused `loadGame` / `saveGame` imports

## Verification
- `tsc --noEmit` — zero errors
- unit tests — 209/210 pass (1 pre-existing failure)
- oxlint — 28 → 22 errors (6 fixed, 22 remaining are pure redundancy)
title: fix(backend): remove any types in pveHandlers, drop unused XState imports
